title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Law, Unknown person #7, Denjiro, Unknown person #8 as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what if these three puny pirate ships came to save the Samural!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already caught all these small fry before in Wano Country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Get this over with and sink them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why are these under-lings getting so cocky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're looking down on us, stand back!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: idiot, you're the one that should stand back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, don't follow me. I can finish them off in one hit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You two slowpokes can get the leftovers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be scared, these guys aren't anything to be....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys look like you're in a pinch!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: It's the ship of the kyoshiro family!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: BOSS Kyoshiro is here!! We're Saved!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-Orders from Master Crochi!! It should be fine if yousink them all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you want me to sink the enemies? Okay, leave it to me!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
